title: 2026 Grammys Awards Predictions in Every Category
text:
Song of the Year Prediction - 2026 Grammys

Predicted Winner: "Golden" from KPop Demon Hunters

Could Also Win: "Wildflower" by Billie Eilish, "Abracadabra" by Lady Gaga

Analysis: The prediction notes an interesting dynamic: "Golden" received only a Song of the Year nomination, not Record of the Year. Variety's analysts suggest this concentrated focus could actually work in the track's favor, allowing all voter enthusiasm to channel into this single category.

The analysis emphasizes that Song of the Year is the appropriate venue to recognize the compositional craftsmanship behind the KPop Demon Hunters composition. Additionally, the piece notes that many parents who heard the song repeatedly may support recognizing the K-pop protectors with a significant award rather than just a lower-tier recognition.

However, the article acknowledges genuine uncertainty, noting there are "five or six different ways this one could go," indicating this remains a genuinely competitive race with multiple viable outcomes.
